'''Verdian vine beans''' were a type of [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetable]]<ref name="LE" /> from the [[Verdi system/Legends|Verdi system]].<ref name="Planetnamia" /> Verdian vine beans were served aboard the luxury [[Hovertrain/Legends|repulsortrain]] [[Gem of Alderaan]]<ref name="GA">{{DoD|The Gem of Alderaan}}</ref> and at the annual [[Vor-cal Feast]] held aboard the [[House Melantha Orbital Hunting Lodge]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vycinyth]].<ref name="LE" />
